output.formatted:
Enema of the State

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
SELECT ?album ?albumLabel WHERE {
  ?album rdfs:label "Enema of the State" @en ; wdt:P577 ?releaseDate ; wdt:P170 / wdt:P357 ?song .
  ?song rdfs:label "What's My Age Again" @en .
  FILTER(YEAR(?releaseDate) = 1999)
  .
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" .
  }
}
```

Execution result:
Got no rows and 2 columns
